feature_launches: AI Agents (New): Automate busy work, keep work moving 24/7.
AI Meeting Notes: Perfectly written by AI.
Custom Agents (New): Automate repetitive work for your team.
Q&A agents: Answer questions instantly using existing knowledge.
Task routing agents: Assigns, prioritizes, and routes tasks automatically.
Reporting agents: Summarizes, writes, and sends reports.
Ability to create Custom Agents for any repetitive work (e.g., triage product feedback, resolve support tickets, respond to security alerts, automate weekly reporting).
messaging_shifts: Strong emphasis on Notion as 'The AI workspace that works for you' and 'Your AI workspace'.
Focus on AI-driven automation and continuous productivity: 'Notion agents keep work moving 24/7... all while you sleep.'
Messaging around platform consolidation and efficiency: 'More productivity. Fewer tools. Bring all your tools and teams under one roof.' and 'One hub for work and AI.'
Positioning AI-native tools as a competitive advantage.

loves: Ability to solve many problems with one tool (single platform value).
Power and impact in streamlining workflows.
AI-native tools provide a competitive advantage.

pricing_changes: Modular/add-on pricing for specific AI and core functionalities:

messaging_shifts: Supercharge your teams with AI that gets work done
Give your teams AI that understands their work, keeps projects moving, and gets better the more your team uses it.
The platform for human + AI collaboration
Manage your team’s work, projects, & tasks online
Track work and see progress in real time
Unblock teams to hit revenue goals

complaints: ClickUp: Too many features, confusing UX

gaps: Asana is perceived as expensive (compared to competitors or alternatives)
